Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoena Of Susan Haase And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Patrick M. Terry, Esq. of Counsel Force, Tel. 415.365.0543, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

Plaintiff's counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF DAVID HAASE'S Motion To Quash Subpoena Of Susan Haase And For Sanctions as follows: Plaintiff's motion to quash is unopposed and granted. Sanctions in the sum of $460.00 are imposed against defendant's counsel to be paid within twenty days of service of a copy of this order with Notice of Entry. The defendant's failure to serve a copy of the subpoena on plaintiff's counsel and refusal of the defendant to withdraw the subpoena when it was pointed out the subpoena was served after close of discovery was a misuse of the discovery process.
Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
